President Biden Announces New Infrastructure Initiative

January 15, 2024

The White House today announced a sweeping new infrastructure initiative focused on bridge repairs across the United States. The program will allocate $2.5 billion in federal grants to repair structurally deficient bridges in all 50 states.

Transportation Secretary highlighted that this investment will create thousands of construction jobs while improving safety for millions of daily commuters. The first round of grants is expected to be awarded within 90 days.
